opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have not slept in three days because the second I empty my bladder, I feel a sudden, terrifying urge that I am going to wet myself again. I'm at breaking point.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The urgency has become relentless over the last three days — I'm rushing to the toilet every twenty minutes and I can't cope with the exhaustion any more.

symptom_narrative.onset: a long-standing problem with sudden compelling urges that has flared badly over the last three days
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 72 hours of severe worsening on top of a chronic pattern
symptom_narrative.character: a sudden, overwhelming, almost impossible-to-hold desire to pass urine, often with a little leak before I can get to the toilet
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been — I'm terrified of wetting myself and I haven't slept in three days
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it's the bladder / needing to wee, not any pain anywhere
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: day and night — more than fifteen trips a day and waking almost every hour overnight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; staying within reach of a toilet is the only thing that helps
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it feels worse when I've had a lot of coffee and energy drinks to stay awake
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no burning when I wee, no blood that I've seen, and no pain in my back or sides; the stream itself is normal, I don't strain and I'm not blocked up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this urgency on and off for a long time but never this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't leave the house or sleep; I'm exhausted and frightened of having an accident in public

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: nothing regular — I'm not on any water tablets or bladder medicines

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: drinking a lot of coffee and energy drinks over the last few days to fight off the tiredness
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: avoiding going out because I'm scared of not reaching a toilet in time

objective_data_offered.value: passing only tiny amounts each time, going more than fifteen times a day and waking almost every hour at night
drinking lots of coffee and energy drinks over the last few days to stay awake
